description: Boards for visualizing metrics, synthesizing research findings, tracking KPIs, and analyzing survey results to bridge the gap between raw data and strategic decision-making

templates.name: Analytics Dashboard
templates.description: Executive analytics dashboard with KPI cards, trend charts, cohort analysis, funnel metrics, and data source documentation

templates.name: Research Synthesis
templates.description: Qualitative research board for organizing quotes, clustering themes, deriving insights, and prioritizing recommendations

templates.name: KPI Tracker
templates.description: Performance scoreboard with RAG status indicators, trend sparklines, accountable owners, and corrective action plans

templates.name: Survey Analysis
templates.description: Survey results visualization with response summaries, demographic breakdowns, cross-tabulations, and open-ended theme analysis
